basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has released the official Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis with salary as per ICMR norms. Eligible candidates up to 30 years of age holding a B.Sc. Nursing qualification can submit their applications via email on or before 14 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Project Nurse III: Four-year B.Sc. Nursing course from a recognized university/institute. Desirable: Experience in clinical research/AMSP/Infection Control; computer proficiency; good communication skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a four-year B.Sc. Nursing course from a recognized university or institute. Experience in clinical research, AMSP, or Infection Control is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 30 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current notification summary.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Nurse III job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse III role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse III post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Nurse III position will be as per ICMR norms. Specific figures are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Nurse III position at AIIMS Jodhpur through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Jodhpur located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Jodhpur is located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The recruitment is for a contractual position at this institute.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
